heading: Monday Night
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Showers likely near the Massachusetts border, mainly late, a rising chance north to Route 4. Lows in the upper 50s to lower 60s. Winds becoming light, variable to southeast, except southeast 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tuesday
text: Partly to mostly sunny northwest, otherwise clouds decreasing in the afternoon, except remain mostly cloudy southeast. Showers likely near and south of Route 4, slight chance north to Route 2, all mainly in the morning. Highs in the low to mid 70s in the south, and upper 70s to mid 80s north. East to northeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Moistly partly cloudy in far southern New Hampshire, with the slight chance of an early shower; otherwise mainly clear or becoming so. Areas of valley fog, mainly south. Lows from the mid 50s to lower 60s, some lower 50s northeast. Winds becoming light and variable.
